name: website-skills
description: Use when building or editing a Next.js + Tailwind site on the DeployNow stack — App Router, React, DaisyUI, NextAuth, deployed on Vercel. Covers server-first RSC/SSR decisions, file/component naming, layout stability + trace-upward debugging, WebP images, Web Vitals, async error handling, Vercel deploy, and mobile-first patterns.
